name: FleetDM
description: Open-source device management platform for monitoring and securing endpoints

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Fleet dashboard
2. Go to My account (click your avatar)
3. Click 'Get API token'
4. Copy the token
5. Enter your Fleet server URL and token below

credentialFields.label: Fleet Server URL
credentialFields.helpText: The URL of your Fleet server (e.g. https://fleet.yourcompany.com)

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Your Fleet API token. Get it from My account > Get API token in the Fleet UI.

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: List all enrolled hosts and devices in Fleet

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Check host compliance status and policy adherence

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verify Fleet policies are configured and active
